elements.purpose: Smallest visual atoms — no children, no fetching, no arrangement

wrappers.purpose: Holds, groups, or spatially arranges other components

displays.purpose: Renders authored content into a specific visual format

scaffolding.purpose: One-per-page structural skeleton — heroes, portals, frame-mode

integrators.purpose: Fetches, embeds, or binds to external/third-party data

components.name: MermaidColours
components.description: Theme colour definitions for Mermaid diagrams (light/dark/CSS variable mappings).

components.name: CardVideo
components.description: YouTube embed inside a Card wrapper with aspect-ratio iframe.

components.name: CodeComponent
components.description: Simple code block with title and language syntax highlighting.

components.name: CodeSection
components.description: Expandable code section with title header.

components.name: ComplexCodeBlock
components.description: Code block with both pre-note and post-note sections.

components.name: CustomCodeBlock
components.description: Code block with optional pre/post notes and expandable wrapper.

components.name: CustomResponseField
components.description: Custom-styled API response field with configurable margin.

params.name: description
params.description: Primary content rendered by the component.

components.name: FrameQuote
components.description: Framed blockquote with optional author, source link, and image.

components.name: FunctionField
components.description: Solidity function signature field with typed parameter pairs and optional return type.

components.name: LinkedInEmbed
components.description: LinkedIn post embed via responsive iframe with compact layout.

components.name: Quote
components.description: Styled blockquote with accent border and centred italic text.

components.name: ResponseFieldAccordion
components.description: Accordion-style response field with collapsible detail section.

components.name: ResponseFieldExpandable
components.description: Expandable response field that reveals nested content on click.

components.name: ResponseFieldGroup
components.description: Container for grouping multiple response fields with consistent spacing.

params.name: props
params.description: Additional props forwarded to the selected wrapper component.

components.name: ScrollableDiagram
components.description: Pannable diagram container with deterministic preset zoom controls rendered without client-side React state.

params.name: title
params.description: Title text rendered by the component.

params.name: maxHeight
params.description: Max height used by the component.

params.name: minWidth
params.description: Min width used by the component.

params.name: showControls
params.description: When true, renders preset zoom controls.

components.name: ShowcaseVideo
components.description: Full-width video with negative-margin breakout and rounded frame.

components.name: TitledVideo
components.description: Auto-playing video with title/subtitle overlay. Respects prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: ValueResponseField
components.description: API response field with name, type, and value display.

params.name: description
params.description: Primary content rendered by the component.

params.name: label
params.description: Label text rendered by the component.

params.name: line
params.description: Boolean flag that controls component behaviour.

components.name: Video
components.description: Basic framed video player with caption support.

components.name: YouTubeVideo
components.description: YouTube embed via responsive iframe with aspect-ratio preservation.

components.name: YouTubeVideoData
components.description: Renders a columned grid of YouTubeVideo embeds from an items array.
components.deprecated: Duplicate — canonical version is in integrators/video-data/VideoData.jsx.

components.name: YouTubeVideoDownload
components.description: YouTube embed with download hint text below (BROKEN — render content commented out).
components.deprecated: Content is commented out — non-functional. Remove in next cleanup pass.

components.name: AccordionTitle
components.description: Accordion title with icon, name, and optional description subtitle. Wraps CustomCardTitle with an italic description line underneath.

params.name: icon
params.description: Font Awesome icon name (string) or React component.

params.name: description
params.description: Optional subtitle shown below the title in italic.

params.name: style
params.description: Inline style overrides on the wrapper.

examples: <AccordionTitle icon="gear" title="Core" description="Staking, payments, and service discovery" />

components.name: AddressLinks
components.description: Copyable contract address with blockchain explorer and GitHub links.

params.name: address
params.description: Contract address to display and copy.

components.name: ArbitrumIcon
components.description: Arbitrum logo rendered identically to Mintlify FA icons using mask-image technique.

params.name: color
params.description: Override colour. Accepts CSS values including var() custom properties. Default is theme-aware (dark in light mode, light in dark mode).

components.name: ArbitrumSVG
components.description: Inline Arbitrum logo as SVG with currentColor fill.

components.name: BadgeWrapper
components.description: Flex row wrapper for Badge elements. Pass a `badges` array of {color, label} objects for auto-rendering, or use children for manual JSX.

params.name: badges
params.description: Array of {color, label} objects. Rendered automatically as Badge elements.

params.name: children
params.description: Manual Badge JSX. Used if badges prop is omitted.

components.name: BlinkingIcon
components.description: Animated icon with pulsing opacity. Respects prefers-reduced-motion.

params.name: size
params.description: Size of the icon in pixels

params.name: color
params.description: Color of the icon (defaults to theme accent)

components.name: CardTitleTextWithArrow
components.description: Card title with trailing arrow icon for navigation indication.

components.name: ComingSoonCallout
components.description: Banner indicating a feature or page is coming soon. Deprecated wrapper around StatusCallout.

components.name: CopyText
components.description: Text with a click-to-copy button that copies content to clipboard.

components.name: CustomCallout
components.description: Styled callout box. Deprecated alias for IconCallout.

components.name: CustomCardTitle
components.description: Title row with icon and text, using flexbox alignment. Accepts Font Awesome strings or React components as icon. Variant prop controls styling context.

params.name: icon
params.description: Font Awesome icon name (string) or React component (e.g. ArbitrumIcon).

params.name: title
params.description: Title text rendered by the component.

params.name: variant
params.description: Styling context: "card" (default, opinionated), "accordion" (inline, inherits parent styles), "tab" (inline, smaller).

params.name: iconSize
params.description: Icon size in pixels (applies to Font Awesome icons only). Defaults per variant: card=20, accordion=18, tab=14.

components.name: DoubleIconLink
components.description: Inline link with icons on both sides.

params.name: text
params.description: Optional text to display before the link

params.name: iconLeft
params.description: Icon to display on the left

params.name: iconRight
params.description: Icon to display on the right

components.name: DownloadButton
components.description: Lazy-loaded download button with icon that renders on viewport intersection.

components.name: ExternalLinkButton
components.description: Icon button that opens an external link in a new tab. Bordered with rounded corners, hover colour transition.

components.name: FocusableScrollRegions
components.description: Makes scroll regions keyboard-focusable by adding tabindex to matching selectors.

components.name: GotoCard
components.description: Card-style navigation link wrapping Mintlify Card component.

components.name: GotoLink
components.description: Inline navigation link with icon prefix and label.

params.name: text
params.description: Optional text to display before the link

components.name: IconBadgeWrapper
components.description: Flex row wrapper for icon+label tag items. Pass an `items` array of {icon, label} objects. Icons are uncoloured by default — pass `iconColor` to override.

params.name: iconColor
params.description: Colour applied to all icons. Defaults to currentColor if omitted.

params.name: style
params.description: Inline style overrides for the wrapper.

components.name: IconCallout
components.description: Styled callout box with icon, custom colour, and optional corner arrow indicator.

params.name: children
params.description: Content to display in the callout.

params.name: color
params.description: Primary colour for icon, border, and background (defaults to theme accent).

params.name: iconSize
params.description: Size of the main icon in pixels.

params.name: textSize
params.description: Font size for the text content.

params.name: textColor
params.description: Text colour (defaults to match icon colour).

params.name: showArrow
params.description: Show an arrow icon in the top-right corner.

params.name: arrowIcon
params.description: Arrow icon name (when showArrow is true).

params.name: arrowSize
params.description: Size of the arrow icon in pixels.

examples:
<IconCallout color="#4a9eff">Tip content here</IconCallout>
<IconCallout color="#4a9eff" showArrow>Linked tip content</IconCallout>

components.name: Image
components.description: Framed image with optional caption and full-width toggle.

components.name: InlineDivider
components.description: Lightweight horizontal rule with controllable margin, padding, colour, and opacity. Use inside accordions, steps, or anywhere markdown `---` gives no spacing control.

components.name: LinkArrow
components.description: External link with arrow icon, optional description, and line break control.

components.name: LinkIcon
components.description: Wraps a Mintlify Icon in an anchor tag. Strips default Mintlify link styling (border-bottom).

components.name: LinkImage
components.description: Clickable framed image that opens a URL in a new tab.

components.name: LivepeerSVG
components.description: Inline Livepeer logo as SVG with currentColor fill.

components.name: MathBlock
components.description: Renders LaTeX as a block-level math expression using KaTeX.

components.name: MathInline
components.description: Renders LaTeX as inline math using KaTeX.

components.name: PreviewCallout
components.description: Banner indicating content is in preview state. Deprecated wrapper around StatusCallout.

components.name: ReviewCallout
components.description: Banner indicating content is under technical review.

components.name: SocialLinks
components.description: Row of icon-only social media links with tooltips and aria-labels. Pass a links array to customise per product; omit for Livepeer defaults.

params.name: links
params.description: Array of {icon, href, label} objects. Falls back to Livepeer defaults if omitted.

params.name: iconColor
params.description: Override all icons to a single colour.

components.name: Spacer
components.description: Empty spacer div with configurable size and direction.

components.name: StatusCallout
components.description: Banner indicating page/feature status (coming soon or preview) with feedback links.

params.name: type
params.description: Context type: "page" or "tab-group" (affects title text for coming-soon variant).

components.name: TipWithArrow
components.description: Callout with arrow. Deprecated wrapper around IconCallout.

components.name: ColumnsBlogCardLayout

components.name: PostCard

components.name: RssBlogCard
components.description: Blog card for RSS feed data. Matches BlogCard visual quality with icon title, metadata row, scrollable plain text excerpt, and scroll hint. Use for non-Ghost blog sources (Daydream, Streamplace, etc.).

components.description: Multi-column RssBlogCard layout. Use for RSS blog data (non-Ghost sources).

components.name: SolidityEmbed

params.name: filename

components.description: Renders YouTube video data with video embed and metadata columns.

components.description: Generates N numbered accordion sections inside an AccordionGroup.

params.description: Number of placeholder accordion sections to render.

components.name: AccordionLayout
components.description: Vertical stack layout with small gap, designed for accordion content sections.

components.name: BadgeRow
components.description: Unified badge row with variant prop. "text" renders Badge elements from a badges array. "icon" renders icon+label tags from an items array.

params.name: variant
params.description: Display variant: "text" for Badge elements, "icon" for icon+label tags.

examples:
<BadgeRow variant="text" badges={[{color: "blue", label: "video"}]} />
<BadgeRow variant="icon" items={[{icon: "globe", label: "Web"}]} />

components.name: BasicList
components.description: Planned list component — not yet implemented.

components.name: BorderedBox
components.description: Bordered container with configurable radius and background.

params.name: accentBar
params.description: Optional accent border token applied to the left edge.

components.name: CalloutWrapper
components.description: Wraps Mintlify callout types (Tip, Info, Warning, Note, Check) with a styled header and description.

params.name: header
params.description: Bold header text displayed at the top of the callout

examples:
<CalloutWrapper type="tip" header="Are you a Solution Provider?">
  Submit a PR to add your solution here!
</CalloutWrapper>

components.name: CardCarousel
components.description: Paginated horizontal carousel with prev/next navigation and dot indicators.

params.description: Visible count used by the component.

components.description: Horizontally centred container with configurable max-width.

params.name: preset
params.description: Named width/layout preset for common documentation patterns.

components.name: DataWrap
components.description: Transparent wrapper that renders a data value inline. Used to surface pipeline-generated values (e.g. lastVerified dates) in MDX without additional markup.

components.name: DisplayCard
components.description: Card with icon, custom title row, and body content.

params.name: icon
params.description: Icon configuration used by the component.

params.name: title
params.description: Title text rendered by the component.

components.name: DynamicTable
components.description: Renders structured data as a scrollable table with section separators and accessible region.
components.deprecated: Use DynamicTableV2 for new tables that need measured fit-content columns and fluid column tracks.

params.name: contentFitColumns
params.description: ] - Column names that should size to their contents.

components.name: DynamicTableV2
components.description: Renders structured data as a scrollable table with separator rows and intrinsic-width support for fit-to-content columns.

params.name: columnWidths
params.description: Preferred minimum widths keyed by header.

params.name: columnConfig
params.description: Per-column layout flags keyed by header.

components.name: FlexContainer
components.description: Flexbox container with configurable direction, gap, and alignment.

components.name: GridContainer
components.description: CSS Grid container with configurable columns and gap.

components.description: Planned icon list component — not yet implemented.

components.description: Card with inline image alongside content, using negative margin breakout.

params.name: imgProps
params.description: Img props used by the component.

params.name: imgStyle
params.description: Img style used by the component.

params.name: cardProps
params.description: Card props used by the component.

components.name: InteractiveCard
components.description: Single interactive card with hover effects.

components.name: InteractiveCards
components.description: Multi-column layout of interactive cards.

components.description: Renders an array of step items inside Mintlify Steps component.

params.name: listItems
params.description: Collection data rendered by the component.

params.name: stepsConfig
params.description: Steps config used by the component.

components.name: QuadGrid
components.description: 2x2 grid with centred rotating icon overlay. Respects prefers-reduced-motion.

params.name: icon
params.description: Icon configuration used by the component.

params.name: iconSize

params.description: Icon configuration used by the component.

params.name: spinDuration
params.description: Spin duration used by the component.

components.name: ScrollBox

components.name: SearchTable
components.description: Generic filterable table wrapper with search input, category dropdown(s), and optional separators.
components.deprecated: Use SearchTableV2 for new tables that need content-driven sizing and composable column behaviour.

params.name: itemsList
params.description: ] - Row data objects. Cell values can be strings or JSX.

params.name: monospaceColumns
params.description: ] - Column indices to render in monospace.

params.name: searchPlaceholder
params.description: Placeholder text for the search input.

params.name: searchColumns
params.description: ] - Column names to search against. Defaults to all headers.

params.name: categoryColumn
params.description: Field name the first dropdown filters on.

params.name: filterColumns
params.description: ] - Additional column names that get dropdown filters. Each scoped by selections above it.

params.name: columnWidths
params.description: Column width overrides keyed by header name. Passed to TableComponent.

params.name: contentFitColumns
params.description: ] - Column names that should size to their contents when supported by TableComponent.

params.name: columnVariant
params.description: Column display variants keyed by header name. Supported: "bold", "badge", "textIcon", "addressWrapper".

params.name: categoryBadges
params.description: ] - Array of {color, label} for "badge" variant rendering. Matched by label (case-insensitive).

params.name: textIcons
params.description: ] - Array of {label, icon} for "textIcon" variant rendering. Icon is JSX rendered inline before the label text.

params.name: showSeparators
params.description: When true, inserts category separator rows. Labels are uppercased.

params.name: separatorColumn
params.description: Override which column drives separators. Default: categoryColumn.

params.name: boldFirstColumn
params.description: Auto-wraps first column in <strong> if value is a plain string.

components.name: SearchTableV2
components.description: Generic filterable table wrapper with intrinsic-width sizing for badge, icon, and primary text columns.

params.name: itemsList
params.description: ] - Row data objects. Cell values can be strings or JSX.

params.name: monospaceColumns
params.description: ] - Column indices to render in monospace.

params.name: searchPlaceholder
params.description: Placeholder text for the search input.

params.name: searchColumns
params.description: ] - Column names to search against. Defaults to all headers.

params.name: categoryColumn
params.description: Field name the first dropdown filters on.

params.name: filterColumns
params.description: ] - Additional column names that get dropdown filters. Each scoped by selections above it.

params.name: columnWidths
params.description: Column width overrides keyed by header name. Passed to TableComponent.

params.name: columnConfig
params.description: Optional column sizing overrides merged with V2 defaults.

params.name: columnVariant
params.description: Column display variants keyed by header name. Supported: "bold", "badge", "textIcon", "addressWrapper".

params.name: categoryBadges
params.description: ] - Array of {color, label} for "badge" variant rendering. Matched by label (case-insensitive).

params.name: textIcons
params.description: ] - Array of {label, icon} for "textIcon" variant rendering.

params.name: showSeparators
params.description: When true, inserts category separator rows. Labels are uppercased.

params.name: separatorColumn
params.description: Override which column drives separators. Default: categoryColumn.

params.name: boldFirstColumn
params.description: Auto-wraps first column in <strong> if value is a plain string.

components.name: ShowcaseCards
components.description: Paginated card layout with search, category, and product filtering.

components.name: SolutionCard
components.description: Card body for Solutions Portal product cards. Accepts pre-rendered JSX slots for badges, infra tags, and social links. ScrollBox is passed as a component prop for blurb rendering.

params.name: logoSrc
params.description: Path to the product logo image.

params.name: logoAlt
params.description: Alt text for the logo image.

params.name: blurb
params.description: Product description text. Rendered inside ScrollBox.

params.name: ScrollBox
params.description: ScrollBox component reference, passed from parent MDX.

components.name: SolutionItem
components.description: Renders a solution entry with link, icon badges, and description. Designed for solution listing pages.

params.name: link
params.description: Link element (e.g. <LinkArrow />), rendered as the heading

examples:
<SolutionItem
  link={<LinkArrow href="https://daydream.live" label="Daydream" />}
  iconWrapper={<IconBadgeWrapper items={daydreamInfra} iconColor="var(--accent)" size={12} />}
  description="Real-time AI video, world models"
  divider={true}
/>

components.name: StepLinkList
components.description: Renders listItems as Mintlify Steps with GotoLink navigation.

components.name: StepList
components.description: Renders listItems as Mintlify Steps with title, icon, and content.

components.name: StyledStep
components.description: Single step with configurable icon, size, and per-step colour overrides. When iconColor or titleColor is set, injects a scoped CSS override that takes precedence over the parent StyledSteps colours for this step only. When neither is set, behaves identically to a plain Step pass-through.

params.name: divider
params.description: Show a divider line after the step content.

components.name: StyledSteps
components.description: Wrapper around Mintlify Steps with custom icon styling via injected CSS.

components.name: StyledTable
components.description: Full-width table with header row styling and rounded container.

components.name: TableCell
components.description: Table cell that switches between th and td based on header prop.

components.name: TableRow
components.description: Table row with optional header styling and hover effect.

components.name: UpdateLinkList
components.description: Renders update items as linked entries inside Mintlify Update component.

components.name: UpdateList
components.description: Planned update list component — not yet implemented.

components.name: WidthCard
